---
title: "Synthetic project geography explorer"
description: "Explore fictional project years, cohorts, topics, statuses, handoffs, and generalized service areas."
page-layout: full
toc: false
css:
  - assets/vendor/leaflet/1.9.4/leaflet.css
  - assets/css/project-map.css
format:
  html:
    axe: true
    link-external-icon: true
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <script src="assets/vendor/leaflet/1.9.4/leaflet.js"></script>
      <script type="module" src="assets/js/project-map.js"></script>
---

::: {.callout-warning}
## Synthetic demonstration only

Every project and service area is invented. **Synthetic demonstration record — not an actual Developers Academy project.** Broad region labels and generalized shapes provide orientation only; they do not describe Academy activity, partners, participants, findings, or exact boundaries.
:::

Use the filters, map, or project table to compare the fictional registry. The map is an optional enhancement: the complete semantic table is present before JavaScript runs and remains useful when scripts or geographic resources fail.

<a class="project-map-skip" href="#project-list">Skip map and view project list</a>

<section class="project-explorer project-filters" aria-labelledby="filter-heading" data-project-explorer>
    <h2 id="filter-heading">Filter synthetic projects</h2>
    <fieldset>
      <legend>Project attributes</legend>
      <section class="project-filter-grid">
        <label>Search <input id="project-search" type="search" autocomplete="off" placeholder="Title, topic, keyword, or ID"></label>
        <label>From year <input id="from-year" type="number" min="1900" max="2100" inputmode="numeric"></label>
        <label>Through year <input id="through-year" type="number" min="1900" max="2100" inputmode="numeric"></label>
        <label>Topic <select id="topic-filter"><option value="">All topics</option></select></label>
        <label>Cohort <select id="cohort-filter"><option value="">All cohorts</option></select></label>
        <label>Status <select id="status-filter"><option value="">All statuses</option></select></label>
        <label>Project type <select id="type-filter"><option value="">All project types</option></select></label>
        <label>Geography representation <select id="geography-filter"><option value="">All representations</option></select></label>
      </section>
    </fieldset>
    <nav class="project-actions" aria-label="Explorer actions">
      <button id="clear-filters" type="button">Clear all filters</button>
      <button id="fit-results" type="button">Fit map to results</button>
      <button id="reset-map" type="button">Reset map</button>
    </nav>
    <p id="project-result-count" class="project-result-count">10 projects shown; 9 have mapped service areas.</p>
    <p id="project-live-status" class="visually-hidden" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true"></p>
</section>

<p id="project-data-alert" class="project-alert" role="alert" hidden></p>

<section class="project-explorer project-map-layout">
    <section aria-labelledby="map-heading">
      <h2 id="map-heading">Generalized project geography</h2>
      <section id="project-map" class="project-map" role="region" aria-label="Interactive map of synthetic Developers Academy project service areas" tabindex="0">
        <p id="project-map-fallback">The interactive map loads when local JavaScript and data are available. Use the complete project table below at any time.</p>
      </section>
      <p class="project-attribution">Map interface: Leaflet 1.9.4. Context: Made with Natural Earth. Project geometries: synthetic demonstration data.</p>
    </section>

    <aside id="project-details" class="project-details" aria-labelledby="details-heading" tabindex="-1">
      <h2 id="details-heading">Project details</h2>
      <p class="project-details-placeholder">Choose a map feature or a “View details” button in the table. Projects without mapped geometry remain available through the table.</p>
      <section class="project-details-content" hidden>
        <p class="project-synthetic-warning">Synthetic demonstration record — not an actual Developers Academy project.</p>
        <dl>
          <dt>Project ID</dt><dd data-detail="project_id"></dd>
          <dt>Title</dt><dd data-detail="title"></dd>
          <dt>Summary</dt><dd data-detail="summary"></dd>
          <dt>Years</dt><dd data-detail="years"></dd>
          <dt>Cohorts</dt><dd data-detail="cohorts"></dd>
          <dt>Topics</dt><dd data-detail="topics"></dd>
          <dt>Status</dt><dd data-detail="status"></dd>
          <dt>Project type</dt><dd data-detail="project_type"></dd>
          <dt>Handoff status</dt><dd data-detail="handoff_status"></dd>
          <dt>Geography labels</dt><dd data-detail="geography_labels"></dd>
          <dt>Representation</dt><dd data-detail="representations"></dd>
          <dt>Precision</dt><dd data-detail="precisions"></dd>
        </dl>
        <nav class="project-detail-links" aria-label="Available local project links"></nav>
      </section>
    </aside>
</section>

<section id="project-list" class="project-explorer" aria-labelledby="project-list-heading" aria-label="Scrollable synthetic project table" tabindex="0">
<h2 id="project-list-heading">Complete synthetic project list</h2>
<p id="project-empty-state" class="project-empty-state" hidden>No projects match these filters. Use “Clear all filters” to restore the complete list.</p>
{{< include _generated/project-explorer-table.html >}}
</section>

## Data and provenance

Registry schema version: `1.0.0`. Registry and service-area records were last updated **July 22, 2026**. Project geometry uses WGS 84 longitude/latitude coordinates and is deliberately generalized or representative. Natural Earth 1:110m land supplies local neutral context; no external tile service or runtime API is used.

The static adapter can later be replaced by an authorized API-backed adapter returning the same project and service-area contracts. That change does not require rewriting filter, table, details, or map behavior. Production data governance and basemap selection remain separate decisions.
